name: tabula-mcp
description: Let Claude work with people in shared Tabula.md Markdown workspaces.
long_description: Let Claude work with people in shared Tabula.md Markdown workspaces. Claude can create private drafts, join encrypted live sessions, list, read, search, and write Markdown files, and export fixed encrypted copies. Room and copy keys stay in URL fragments; relays and snapshot storage receive encrypted data.

tools.name: tabula_create_draft
tools.description: Create a private Markdown draft and show its Tabula card.

tools.name: tabula_update_draft
tools.description: Replace the content of a private Markdown draft.

tools.name: tabula_start_session
tools.description: Turn a private draft into an encrypted live Tabula session.

tools.name: tabula_join_room
tools.description: Join an encrypted live Tabula session from a private #room URL.

tools.name: tabula_list_files
tools.description: List Markdown files and folders in a live session.

tools.name: tabula_read_file
tools.description: Read one Markdown file and its current revision.

tools.name: tabula_search_files
tools.description: Search Markdown paths and contents with line-numbered excerpts.

tools.name: tabula_write_file
tools.description: Create or replace a Markdown file while the server computes the collaboration patch.

tools.name: tabula_export_copy
tools.description: Export a draft or live session state as an encrypted fixed #json copy.
